name: Humanis Nashville Hidden Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: A bland civic mask checks whether the intruder belongs.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: The host tries to identify the icon and its route through front-group layers.

securitySheaf.label: Tar Baby IC
securitySheaf.effect: Loyalty-test processes try to pin the intruder in denunciation loops.

securitySheaf.label: Killer IC
securitySheaf.effect: Masked steward icons move from suspicion to attack.

securitySheaf.label: Psychotropic-Style Pressure
securitySheaf.effect: The sculpting turns accusatory, isolating, and hostile.

sculpting: A bland civic shell over torchlit halls, purity banners, locked meeting chambers, blacklist ledgers, donation lockboxes, surveillance galleries, and tribunal figures.
notes: Semi-hidden local Humanis chapter host for coordination, propaganda, contact vetting, and compartmentalized extremist activity.

nodes.title: Bland Civic Mask
nodes.description: The visible layer looks like a sleepy heritage association page. The seams are too clean, and several doors are not listed in the directory.

choices.label: Find and breach the concealed entry path

nodes.title: Pamphlet Gallery
nodes.description: Sanitized talking points, front-group materials, and recruitment slogans sit in locked pamphlet cases under patriotic lighting.

choices.label: Search for coded recruitment and contact patterns

nodes.title: Torchlit Vestibule
nodes.description: The false civic page collapses into torchlight, banners, and locked meeting doors. The host tests belonging through paranoia.

nodes.title: Vetting and Donor Ledger
nodes.description: Coded rosters, blacklist tabs, donor lockboxes, and loyalty notes cross-reference aliases with safe meeting points.

choices.label: Alter a roster or meeting notice

nodes.title: Locked Meeting Chamber Map
nodes.description: Compartmentalized rooms show planned gatherings, factional suspicion, and operational fragments hidden behind loyalty gates.

choices.label: Hold control long enough to map the chapter

nodes.title: Roster Edit Tribunal
nodes.description: Every attempted edit is judged by stone-faced tribunal icons. A bad signature brands the intruder as an enemy inside the sculpting.

choices.label: Break out of the denunciation loop

nodes.title: Chapter Structure Map
nodes.description: The hidden architecture resolves into names, donors, meeting nodes, and front-group relationships the crew can act on.

choices.label: Package the chapter map and log off
Risk one more pull from the action chambers

nodes.title: Exposure Cache
nodes.description: You have evidence that can expose members, donors, planned actions, or front groups, assuming you escape with it intact.

choices.label: Log off through the civic shell
Keep digging despite the accusation maze

nodes.title: Cold Exit
nodes.description: The torchlight snaps back into a forgettable civic facade. The host remains mean, cramped, and suspicious behind you.
